query:
INSERT INTO clientTasks (clientId, taskName, taskOrder, status, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT id, 'Pre Launch Check', 7, 'not_started', NOW(), NOW() FROM clients
UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'Ads Launched', 8, 'not_started', NOW(), NOW() FROM clients;
